svg.text: There is no statutory rate for sampling — it’s negotiated. Cheapest path at the top; cost climbs as you go down.
Splice / Loopmasters — cleared by the license
statutory rate, per copy sold — audio only
agency fee — master & publishing billed separately
if the sample carries the song, they take a split
Illustrative · industry-reported ranges, not statutory rates · the only fixed figure is the 13.1¢ (2026) cover-song mechanical.
